snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Teaser | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby | Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney
Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

#yrfnewreleases #yrf #alpha #yashraj #yashrajfilms #yrfmovies #yrfmusic #yashchopra #adityachopra #akshayewidhani #aliabhatt #sharvari #anilkapoor #bobbydeol #shivrawail #yrfspyuniverse

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas 26th June
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle arrives in cinemas on 26th June, 2026 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 presents 
In association with Seeta Films & Rakesh Dang 
A Base Industries Group Production 
Produced by Firoz  A.  Nadiadwallah, Rakesh Dang & Vedant Vikaas Baali
Director: Ahmed Khan
Co Producer: Shaira Ahmed Khan 
Co Producers: Vijay Khanna, Sanjay N. Morakhia 
Associate Producers: Surinder Khanna, Deepak Malhotra, Sonam Pandey, Paras Mehta, Narinder Bains 
Story: Late Neeraj Vora Ji 
Dialogue: Farhad Samji 
DOP: Kabir Lal
Editor: Nitin FCP 
Music Composers: Vikram Montrose, Talwiinder, NDS, Anand Raaj Anand,  Sajid-Wajid
Lyrics: Meggha Bali, Talwiinder, Abhinav Shekhar, Anand Raaj Anand, Shabbir Ahmed 
Music Supervisor: Meggha Bali
Trailer music produced and programmed: Ankit Gupta ( Ankiie )
Music Label: Junglee Music (A division of Times Music)
Executive Producer: Aniket Rao
Second Unit Director: Adnan A. Shaikh
Associate Director: Shukti Sharma
First Assistant Director: Aniket Rao
Script & Continuity Supervisor & Director’s Assistant: Diisha Danait
Seeta Films CEO: Madhukar Verma
Satellite and Digital Syndication: Prem Raj Joshi 
Costume Designers: Kunal Rawal, Anna Singh, Namita Alexander, Ami Patel, Sunakshi Rathod, Shakil Shetty, Priyanka Mundada, Harshita Ramchandani, Shahdab Malik & Trupti Doifode 
Choreographers: Ganesh Acharya, Adil Shaikh, Prince Gupta, Rahul Shetty
Action Director: Abbas Ali Moghul
Original Background Music: Hanif Shaikh
Background Music Sfx: Prince
Production Designer: Shailesh Mahadik
Art Director: Bablu Singh (Arvind)
Second DOP: Shahid Lal
Production Executives: Kawser Ahmed, Shamsher Ali, Aslam Syed, Anjali Verma, Lubaina Merchant, Nikita Zakodia
Accounts: Dilip Chavan, Vinod Rajapkar
CFO: Srinivas P. Kolan
2nd 2nd (Costume) Assistant Director: Prachi Dubey
3rd Assistant Director: Yash Raghuvansshi
Associate Editors: Mahesh Bhojwani, Ashish Patel
Sound Recordist: Rahul Yadav
Re-recording Mixer: Debajit Changmai (Futureworks Media LTD)
Digital Marketing Partner: Everymedia Technologies PVT LTD.
CA: Abhiraj Ranawat
Casting Director: Girdhar Swami 
Vfx studio: Future Works
DI Studio: Future Works
DI Colourist: Nirmal Sharma

Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda 
Post Producer: Saim Shaikh

snippet.title: Salala Karnali | Pramod Kharel | Pramod & Parampara | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
A soulful tribute to the beauty of Karnali, "Salala Karnali" brings together the timeless voice of Pramod Kharel with the words and music of Suraj Thapa. Shot amid the breathtaking landscapes of Jumla, this song is a heartfelt celebration of love, land, and the spirit of the Karnali region.

🎵 SONG: Salala Karnali

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎤 AUDIO CREDITS
Lyrics / Music: 
Suraj Thapa

Vocal: 
Pramod Kharel

Supporting Vocal: 
Shristi Budha

Music Arrangement: 
Pramod & Parampara, Suraj Thapa

Additional Music Arrangement: 
Rahul Bhujel

Intro Lyrics: 
Bhim BC

Intro Song Composition: 
Pramod Kharel

Chorus: 
Bikram Karki, Pratik Biswokarma, Suraj Thapa

Recorded at: 
Studio M Nepal

Recordist: 
Manjil KC

Female Melody Recorded at: 
Maruni Digital (by Suman Rama)

Mix & Mastering: 
Kishor Thapa (A One Musician Studio)

Digital Management: 
Manoz Sapkota

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎬 VIDEO CREDITS
Featuring: 
Pramod Kharel & Ashwini Shahi

Direction: 
Laxman Paudyal

DOP: 
Arjun Tiwari

Visual Edit / Color Grading: 
Milan Bishwokarma

Post: 
Dragon Pictures (📞 9843866422)

Producer: 
Dipa Sitaula

MUA: 
Geet Lama

Production Manager: 
Bishal Karkee

Publicity Design: 
Shann Thapa

Media Coordination: 
Gopi Krishana Chapagain

Dress Partner: 
Kalo Falam

Hair Partner: 
Royal Milano

Hospitality Partner: 
Apricus Garden Restaurant

Supported by: 
Gaau Besi Logistics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🙏 We are grateful to Hon. Gyanedra Shahi.
Heartful thanks to Talfi, Patarashi Rural Municipality, and all the local residents of Jumla.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

snippet.description:
#aamrapalidubey #ladomadhesiya #amitshukla #avdheshmishra #anitarawat #omjha #piyari #aamraplaidubeyfanpage #bhojpuri #trending #trailer
 
IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH 3R FILM AND PRODUCTIONS

फ़िल्म –  पियरी  (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – आम्रपली  दुबे  , लाडो   मधेसिया  , अमित शुक्ला , अवधेश  मिश्रा  , अनीता  रावत  , साहिल  सिद्दीकी , ज्योति  मिश्रा  , निशा  तिवारी  , अनु  ओझा  
निर्देशक –  इश्तियाक़ शेख बंटी
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक - अरबिंद तिवारी
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी
संकलन - प्रीतम नायक
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - प्रीती प्रीत स्टूडियो
छायांकन-  डी के शर्मा
 कोरियोग्राफर -  कानू मुख़र्जी , सोनू प्रीतम
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - शिवा जयसवाल
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, इश्तियाक़ शेख बंटी ,  नूरसबा शेख
म्यूजिक –  IVY Music 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी

B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव
B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा
IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  
प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , हिमांशु चौधरी


B4U - फाइनेंस
संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , शैलेश त्रिवेदी , प्रफुल्ल

FILM – PIYARI  (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST – Aamraplai Dubey , Lado madhesiya , Amit Shukla, Awdhesh Mishra , Anita rawat , Saahil Siddiqui, Jyoti Mishra , Nisha tiwari , Anu ojha ,  
  CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH 
DIRECTOR- ISHTIYAQUE SHAIKH BUNTY 
WRITER  – ARBIND TIWARI  
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA  
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI  
EDITOR- PREETAM NAYAK 
CINEMATOGRAPHER- D.K SHARMA 
CHOREOGRAPHER – KANU MUKHERJEE , SONU PRITAM 
ART DIRECTOR- SHIVA JAISWAL 
POST PRODUCTION – PREETI PREET STUDIO 
ACTION – DINESH YADAV 
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH , ISHTIYAQUE SHAIKH BUNTY, NOORSABHA SHAIKH 

Music – IVY MUSIC
Satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI


B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL ,POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE MORE
OFFICE BOY – KANHAYA JHA 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY

B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , SHAILESH TRIVEDI , PRAFULL GAIKWARD

Music video by Chinoetales Production.

(2026)                  : Hamro Events (Canada)

Abhishek Khadka , Parika Bhandari

Supporting act : 
Amar Babu (Brother), Badri Pudasaini (Father), Ganu Koirala (Mother)

Director : Abhi Sampang Rai

Puju Shrestha, Ranju Nepal, Sundar Pariyar, Dipak Gajamer, Sagar Panta, Jaya Ram Bhatta, DP Bhattarai, Sailendra Raj Bhattarai, Radha Krishna Bhatta, Mana Maya Magar, Prem Nath Pathak, Anita Giri, Suprina Nepal, Abshiek Rai, Radhika Thapa, Laxmi Budha, Anshika Gurung, Sandesh Tamang, Samir Diyali, Sujata Magar, ⁠Samita Tamang, Namaraj Pokhral

Parbat Bhandari dai for having such blind faith on us. Kiran Pratap Singh bhai for guiding us through this beautiful journey. Ashtrona - you are a true Artist and beautiful inspiring soul we have come across. Prajesh (Harmonium musicals) dai for constantly supporting us from day 1. 
Snehi Karmacharya, Arshia Shrestha, Dolmu Sherpa, Crishtina Tamang for supporting constantly and holding hands on this journey to follow this dream. Saswot shrestha bhai for handling the craziness we bring to your studio.

OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. Now, It stands out as a prominent distributor of super-hit Nepali movie entertainment content on its YouTube channel in the country. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Tujhko (from Cocktail 2) Rashmika Mandanna, Shahid Kapoor & Kriti | Love Song 2026
snippet.description:
✨ Presenting a special tribute to "Tujhko" – the beautifully soulful and romantic track from the upcoming movie Cocktail 2! Featuring the incredible chemistry of Shahid Kapoor and Rashmika Mandanna, this song beautifully blends romance with deep emotion.

If you love this track as much as I do, don't forget to LIKE, SHARE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more music content! 🔔

#Tujhko #Cocktail2 #ArijitSingh #SunidhiChauhan #Pritam #ShahidKapoor #RashmikaMandanna #LatestHindiSongs #RomanticSongs2026

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
➟ Song: Tujhko
➟ Movie: Cocktail 2 (Releasing 19th June, 2026)
➟ Music Director: Pritam
➟ Singers: Arijit Singh & Sunidhi Chauhan
➟ Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
➟ Mixed & Mastered by: Shadab Rayeen at NewEdge
➟ Star Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, and Ankur Garg
➟ Banner: Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description: Welcome To The Jungle Trailer Review by Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez in Welcome 3 Welcome To The Jungle Trailer Directed by Ahmed Khan is a 50-50 Experience with Forced Laughter Outdated Dialogues & Random Edit Scenes with no Nostalgia Factor. Welcome To The Jungle Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectations would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Ajay Devgn for Dhamaal 4 Trailer? Do leave Comments below.

snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Akshay & IP
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai In Cinemas Now

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: Ucha Lamba Kad Forever | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar | Disha Patani | Vikram M | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting Ucha Lamba Kad Forever, the latest song from Welcome To The Jungle ❤️🎶 The melody that became everyone’s favourite is back to make you sing, dance, and vibe all over again. Bringing back the charm, nostalgia, and the magic of a song that has lived in playlists and hearts for years.

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

The thePJ is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

bn.title: ওয়েলকাম টু দ্য জাঙ্গল ট্রেলার • রিঅ্যাকশন
bn.description:
#WelcomeToTheJungle #thePJ #PJExplained

আমার সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া হ্যান্ডেলগুলো: 
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
টুইটার: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
স্ন্যাপচ্যাট: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

থ্রেডস: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
ফেসবুক: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

thePJ হলো একটি ওয়েব চ্যানেল, যার উদ্দেশ্য হলো চলচ্চিত্র পর্যালোচনা, সাক্ষাৎকার, আলোচনা, ভিডিও প্রবন্ধ এবং বিশ্লেষণধর্মী সংকলনের মাধ্যমে সিনেমার প্রচার করা। এর প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো সিনেমা নিয়ে তথ্যসমৃদ্ধ আলোচনা, সমালোচনা এবং পর্যালোচনাকে উৎসাহিত করা এবং এই লক্ষ্যে অনুষ্ঠানগুলোতে চলচ্চিত্র, শব্দ রেকর্ডিং এবং আলোকচিত্রের সংক্ষিপ্ত অংশ ব্যবহার করা হয়। এই ক্লিপ এবং অংশবিশেষগুলো খুবই সামান্য এবং এর ব্যবহার কপিরাইটের মালিকদের দ্বারা সম্পূর্ণ কাজটির বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহারে কোনোভাবেই হস্তক্ষেপ করার উদ্দেশ্যে নয়। কাজগুলোর ব্যবহার কপিরাইট আইনের ৫২ ধারার অধীনে প্রদত্ত ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের ব্যতিক্রমের সাথে সঙ্গতিপূর্ণ, এবং আমরা সমালোচনা ও পর্যালোচনার জন্য প্রদত্ত ব্যতিক্রমের অধীনে কাজগুলো ব্যবহারের দাবি করি।

SlumDog - 33 Temple Road is an upcoming gritty pan-India action drama which brings dashing director Puri Jagannadh and versatile actor Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi together for one of the most intriguing collaborations. Produced by Puri Jagannadh and Charmme Kaur under the Puri Connects banner, in collaboration with JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla's JB Motion Pictures.

snippet.title: Aaj Se Teri - Lyrical | Padman | Akshay Kumar & Radhika Apte | Arijit Singh | Amit Trivedi
snippet.description:
Singer - Arijit Singh
Music - Amit Trivedi
Lyricist - Kausar Munir

Crew Names:-
Produced & Arranged by - Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar 
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed by - Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai Assisted by : Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Mastered by - Donal Whelan, Masteringworld - U.K.
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula

Musician Names:-
Programmed by Amit Trivedi, Gourab Dutta & Raja Rasaily
Dholak & Percussions - Sanket Naik  
Mandolin, Saz & Bouzouki - Tapas Roy  
Shehnai - Omkar Dhumal

Cast - Akshay Kumar, Radhika Apte & Sonam Kapoor
Production House - Hope Production Pvt Ltd
Producer - Twinkle Khanna, SPE Films India, KriArj Entertainment, Cape Of Good Films & Hope Productions
Director - R Balki

Lyrics:
Mukhda -
Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…

Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…
Aaj Se Meri Saari Khushiyaan Teri Ho Gayi,
Aaj Se Tera Gum Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 1- 
Tere Maathe Aaaaa….Tere Maathe Ke Kumkum Ko
Main Tilak Lagaa Ke Ghoomoonga, 
Teri Baali Ki Chhunchhun Ko
Main Dil Se Lagaa Ke Jhoomoonga…

Meri Chhoti Si Bhoolon, 
Ko Tu Nadiya Mein Baha Dena.
Tere Jude Ke Phoolon Ko, 
Main Apne Shirt Mein Pehnoonga.

Bas Mere Liye Tu Maalpue Kabhi Kabhi Bana Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Ratiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Din Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 2-
Tu Maange Sardi Mein Amiya, 
Jo Maange Garmi Mein Mungphaliyaan, 
Tu Baarish Mein Agar Keh De,
Ja Mere Liye Tu Dhoop Khila.

Toh Main Sooraj……. Toh Main Sooraj Ko Jhatak Doonga, 
Toh Main Saawan Ko Gatak Loonga,
Toh Saare Taaron Sang Chanda
Main Teri Goad Mein Rakh Doonga-

Bas Mere Liye Tu Khil Ke Kabhi Muskuraa Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Sadiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Pal Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tere Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwaabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se ……Tera Ho Gaya.

#PadmanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #AkshayKumarSongs #NewHindiSongs

#bollywoodlyricalsongs #trendingsongs #romanticsongs #newhindisongs #lyrical 

🔔 Subscribe to Bollywood Lyrical Songs and turn on notifications to enjoy daily lyrical song uploads and the latest Bollywood music updates.

snippet.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai - Trailer | Varun | Mrunal | Pooja | David | In Cinemas 5th June 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready for fun, romance & full entertainment! 🎬✨
Presenting the Trailer of Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai starring Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur & Pooja Hegde, directed by David Dhawan.
A perfect mix of comedy, love, confusion & family drama awaits you on the big screen! ❤️🔥

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer

Song Credits : 
Track Name: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai 
Music Recreated by: Javed - Mohsin 
Additional Lyrics by: Mohsin Shaikh
Singers: Shankar Mahadevan & Hema Sardesai
Rap By Ranj & Earl Edgar
Original Music Composer: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics by: Sameer Anjaan

snippet.title: Dhurandhar ke Baad Yeh Universe Ka Kya Hoga: Alpha Teaser EXPOSED
snippet.description:
🔥 ALPHA Teaser Reaction & Review | Alia Bhatt | Sharvari | Anil Kapoor | YRF Spy Universe 🔥

In this video, I share my honest reaction and detailed review of the much-awaited ALPHA Teaser starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, and Anil Kapoor from the legendary YRF Spy Universe. 🎬

The teaser looks intense, action-packed, and promises a powerful female-led spy thriller. In this reaction video, we break down the teaser, discuss the action sequences, performances, storyline hints, YRF Spy Universe connections, hidden details, and what fans can expect from the movie.

💥 Is ALPHA going to be the next blockbuster in the YRF Spy Universe? 💥 How does Alia Bhatt look as a spy? 💥 What role will Sharvari and Anil Kapoor play? 💥 Teaser Breakdown, Easter Eggs & Fan Theories!

Watch till the end and share your thoughts in the comments. Don't forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more reactions, reviews, and entertainment content.

bn.title: ধুরন্ধরের পর এই মহাবিশ্বের কী হবে: আলফা টিজার ফাঁস
bn.description:
🔥 আলফা টিজার প্রতিক্রিয়া ও পর্যালোচনা | আলিয়া ভাট | শারভারি | অনিল কাপুর | ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্স 🔥

এই ভিডিওতে, আমি কিংবদন্তী ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের আলিয়া ভাট, শারভারি এবং অনিল কাপুর অভিনীত বহু প্রতীক্ষিত 'আলফা' টিজারের উপর আমার অকপট প্রতিক্রিয়া এবং বিস্তারিত পর্যালোচনা তুলে ধরেছি। 🎬

টিজারটি বেশ উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ, অ্যাকশন-ভরা এবং একটি শক্তিশালী নারী-প্রধান স্পাই থ্রিলারের প্রতিশ্রুতি দিচ্ছে। এই প্রতিক্রিয়া ভিডিওতে, আমরা টিজারটি বিশ্লেষণ করেছি এবং এর অ্যাকশন সিকোয়েন্স, অভিনয়, গল্পের ইঙ্গিত, ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের সংযোগ, লুকানো বিবরণ এবং ভক্তরা সিনেমাটি থেকে কী আশা করতে পারেন, তা নিয়ে আলোচনা করেছি।

💥 আলফা কি ওয়াইআরএফ স্পাই ইউনিভার্সের পরবর্তী ব্লকবাস্টার হতে চলেছে? 💥 একজন গুপ্তচর হিসেবে আলিয়া ভাটকে কেমন লাগছে? 💥 শারভারি এবং অনিল কাপুর কী চরিত্রে অভিনয় করবেন? 💥 টিজার বিশ্লেষণ, ইস্টার এগস ও ফ্যান থিওরি!

শেষ পর্যন্ত দেখুন এবং কমেন্টে আপনার মতামত জানান। আরও রিঅ্যাকশন, রিভিউ এবং বিনোদনমূলক কন্টেন্টের জন্য লাইক, শেয়ার ও সাবস্ক্রাইব করতে ভুলবেন না।

#আলফা #আলফাটিজার
#আলফাটিজারপ্রতিক্রিয়া
#আলফাটিজাররিভিউ
#আলফাটিজারপাবলিকপ্রতিক্রিয়া

bn.title: স্পাইডার-ম্যানের ট্রেইলার আবার ফাঁস? ডুমসডে ট্রেইলার কেলেঙ্কারি? - রোস্টভার্স ১৭২
bn.description:
ভিডিওটি ভালো লাগলে একটি 'লাইক' দিন

০০:০০ ভূমিকা
০০:২৭ এমসিইউ-তে রুসোদের ভবিষ্যৎ
০০:৫৭ ব্যাকরুমস-এর সিক্যুয়েল তৈরি হচ্ছে...?
০১:১২ ম্যান অফ টুমরো সেটের তথ্য ফাঁস...
০২:০০ ৩০-এর দশকে স্পাইডার...
০২:৩৭ দ্য ওডিসি-র খবর ও আপডেট
০৩:১৩ সাপ্তাহিক গেমিং পর্ব
০৫:৪১ মানে যা খুশি...
০৬:৪২ ০০৭ ফার্স্ট লাইট সিক্যুয়েলের বড় আপডেট!!!

০৭:১৫ অ্যাভেঞ্জার্স: ডুমসডে রি-শুট আপডেট
০৭:৩১ নেটফ্লিক্স তাদের আসল চেহারা দেখালো!!?

০৮:০৭ ডব্লিউবিডি-প্যারামাউন্ট আপডেট
০৮:৪৪ স্পাইডার-ম্যান: বিএনডি-র লেখক প্রকাশ পেলেন!!?

০৯:০০ চুনা লাগিয়ে দিয়েছে!!!
১১:৪৪ ফাঁস করে দিয়েছ না...
১২:৫১ স্পাইডার-ম্যান ট্রেইলার আবার ফাঁস হলো!!?

১৫:১৭ স্পাইডার-ম্যান: ব্র্যান্ড নিউ ডে-এর রানটাইম
১৫:২৬ মোকটেল সেগমেন্ট
১৫:৩৭ আউটরো

আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 
· ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/comicverseyt/
· এক্স - https://x.com/comicverseyt

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

snippet.title: The Booyah Awards 2026 - Still on Top or Taken Over? | Free Fire MAX
snippet.description:
Welcome to The Booyah Awards 2026, the biggest celebration of the Free Fire MAX community.

After a year of clutch Booyahs, viral moments, unforgettable streams, and incredible content, it's time to crown the creators, players, and personalities who defined the year. But with new challengers rising every day, the question remains:

🔥 Are the legends still on top?

Join us for an evening packed with awards, entertainment, special appearances, and the biggest names in Free Fire MAX.

Who will take home the glory? 

#FreeFireMAX #Booyah

snippet.title: Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan
snippet.description:
Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ❤️
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, “Gajale Sunchari.”

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.


Audio Credits

Lyrics
Hark Saud

Vocal & Music
Sujan Chapagain

Poem
Pallawib

snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

The pressure rises as BMPS 2026 Semi Finals enter Day 3!

With two days of action completed, teams now have a clearer picture of where they stand. Some will be looking to strengthen their hold on the Top 6, while others will be fighting to break into the qualification spots before it's too late.

All groups return to the battleground for another day of high-stakes action where every finish and placement point could shape the final standings

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Bhawana (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Bhawana explores the inner struggles of the mind, feelings of anxiety, loneliness and self-doubt. It emphasises the importance of self-compassion, seeking support, and allowing space to heal affirming that even in moments of darkness, recovery and inner peace are possible, when help is provided for.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocal, Guitar, Backing Vocals
Pranai Gurung - Guitars
Rahul Rai - Bass
Achint Khare - Keys, Organ
Aman Singh Rathore - Drums

Lyrics, Composition and Arrangement by Bipul Chettri
Recorded by Anindo Bose
Mixed and Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

VIDEO

Performers - Endo Mrinal, Deo Dorjay Yolmo

Directed by - Gundruk

Color - AB Studios

Co-Producer - Vazzu

snippet.title: VEK X Ashira Shah - Ghumna Jauna (Prod. by pozod)
snippet.description:
VEK and Ashira Shah come together for a collaboration for the first time on "Ghumna Jauna", an Afro-inspired track with a feel-good spirit vibe.

Written, composed and performed by VEK and Ashira Shah
Prod. by pozod
Production Manager: Celine Prajapati, SNJV, Beten Shrestha
Dance Choreography: Ojaswi Thapa and Stuti
MUA: Ashmita R Magar and Pratima Gurung
Lights: Baba dai and team
DOP: Sayun Shakya and storenutter
Directed and edited by storenutter

Venue Partner: Keg and Cork

Clothing Partner: Basemark and Latido

Special Thanks to Asif Shah, Nasira Shah, Nixdii, Sanju Bajracharya, Samriddhi KC

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang || Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan || New Selo Song 2026/2082
snippet.description:
🎶 Presenting New Selo Song 2026/2082
"Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang" by Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan.
Hope you all enjoy this beautiful selo audio song. 
Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more new Tamang songs. ❤️

🎧 Song : Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang
🎤 Vocal : Bishwo Dong / Alina Yonjan
✍️🎼 Lyrics / Music / Arrange : Bishwo Dong
🎚 Mixing / Mastering : Dipesh Pradhan (Deep Studio)
🎙 Studio : Dong Studio
🤝 Supporter : Lal Dhoj Tamang

© All Rights Reserved

🔔 Subscribe for more new Tamang Selo songs
👍 Like | Comment | Share

#ManjurinamaDeunaMaichyang
#BishwoDong
#AlinaYonjan
#TamangSeloSong
#NewSeloSong2026
#NepaliSong
#TamangSong
#DongStudio
----------------------------------------------------
१.केटा :
मञ्जुरीनामा देउन मैच्याङ , तिम्रै वरिपरि बस्न लाई २
डाहा त गर्ने दुनियाँ सामु , मायाको डोरी कस्न लाई २
दिलै खोली मन साटेर , मलाई छेउ कुना बस्न देउ १
शंकले होईन मायाले , यो च्याङ्बालाई स्विकारि देउ २

१.केटी :
राजिनामा पेश गर्छु म त , च्याङ्बाको यस्तो पारा लाई
सोमात भन्ने केही छैन , तामासा देखाउँछ सारा लाई
किन पो बस्नु मेरो छेउ , यो झ्यान नभै नामसारी 
खुस्केको होकि त्यो दिमाग , शंका नै लाग्छ गरि गरि

२.केटा :
च्याङ्बाको कुरा सुन मैच्याङ , मायामा गरौं गठ्बन्धन २
धर्ती फाट्ला आकाश खस्ला , छुट्दैन मायाको यो बन्धन २
पागल उपाधी दिन्छ यहाँ , मायाले मनको कुरा बोल्दा १
घुम्स्याई नराख त्यो माया , के नै जान्छ र दिल खोल्दा २
२.केटी :
रंग न ढंग को कुरा गर्छ , छेउ टुप्पो केही नमिल्ने 
दश बित्ते मान्छे तीस बित्ते फुँई , कसरी मैले पत्याउने
बाउ बाजेको इज्जत नफाल , आफ्नो छैन भन्दामा 
सोचेको होला मीठो कुरा गरि , मैच्याङ्लाई पारौंला फान्दामा



३.केटा :
आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस 
न्यायाधीश ले जस्तो मैले फेरि , बयान लिनु नपरोस् 


----------------------------------------------------
►TIMESTAMPS 
0:00 - Story  
0:00 - Song Start
0:00 - Last Story
0:00 - Credits Parts
----------------------------------------------------
Please, Subscribe to My YouTube Channel
https://www.youtube.com/@BishwoDong
----------------------------------------------------
FOLLOW ME
----------------------------------------------------
Facebook 
https://www.facebook.com/bishwo.dong
Facebook Page 
https://www.facebook.com/dongbishwo
Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/bishwo.dong
Twitter(X)
https://twitter.com/bishwodong

https://www.tiktok.com/@bishwodong
----------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: The Elements | Thula Thula Sahar (EL3 Rendition)
snippet.description:
EL3 Renditions 

We revisit these stories after 10 years.. Some thing have changed, some things have not. In the mists of Tanahu . 

Video by : 
Sujan Bahadur Basnet 
Siddhartha Shakya (Sid)

Audio Recorded at : Elements HQ 
Produced by : Brihat Pahari | Raunaq Singh Adhikari
                         PaintBox Studios 


Lyrics:
thula thula sahar
thulai soch hola
beglai cha najar
tara sakkincha hola

thula thula mahal
akashai chekkincha hola
sararara motor ma kudincha hola

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

hawa le choyo
beglai lagyo sparsha 
khusi khojna nai
paila sardo raicha

auna ta mann thiyena 
mero baani chalan bhindai
paristhiti testai 
aye sabai nata uchindai

aye hai yo thawai ma
mann bhane chai tei gauwai ma
kate ma hai
kayou khola
mutu bhane 
kati rola

snippet.title: [ WATCHPARTY ] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | LAST DAY
snippet.description:
➡️ Membership Link: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC3IAnSKHhS1CFcxkmHUfFFw/join

➡️ Nepali Superchat Link: 
https://cr8.rs/@rashmay_casts
( This Will display your Message & Amount you donated on the Screen )

➡️ Follow me On instagram: 
https://www.instagram.com/rashmay_/

➡️ Join "OP" Instagram Broadcast Channel:
https://www.instagram.com/channel/AbZ5dS8d0aiI85Vk/

________________________________________________________________________________

2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 ko Main Event ab aafno charam binduma pugisakeko chha – Grand Finals!

Duniya bharika 10 lakh bhanda badhi kheladiharu yo manchma pugna chahanthe. Tara keval thorai teamharule matra aafno sip, mehenat ra nirantar pradarshan dwara yo sthaan hasil gareka chhan. 16 team, 2 din, ra eutai champion. Yo rosterma raheka harek teamle aafno thau sangharsha ra mehenat bata kamai gareko ho. Kasaiko lagi sajilo bato thiyena, kasaiko lagi upahar thiyena. Yaha keval sabai bhanda uttam teamharu champion banna ko lagi aamne-saamne hunechhan.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage
• 32 team 16–16 team ko 2 samuha ma vibhajit
• Kul 2 din (pratyek samuha ko lagi 1 din)
• Samagra Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Samagra Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Samagra Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage
• Samagra Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals
• Samagra Ranking 5–16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals
• 16 team — 2 din, pratyek din 6 match

🔥 SMASH RULE (Day 2 ma lagu hunechha)

SMASH Rule trophy jitne sabai bhanda romanchak tarika ho. Tara kasari?

• Day 1 ko Overall Ranking #1 team ko point +10 = Match Point Threshold
• Day 2 ma threshold pura garepachi arko match jitnuparcha title jitna
• Yadi kunai team le SMASH pura garna saken bhane, sabai bhanda dherai overall point bhayeko team vijeta hunchha

🗓 Tournament Talika

• Group Stage: June 2–3
• Survival Stage: June 4
• Grand Finals: June 6–7

💰 Kul Prize Pool: $500,000

🏅 Grand Final Teams:
4T
721
Aur
BOOM
BTR
EA
FL
FURIA
GEEK
goat
GSTR
HORAA
PNDM
S2G
TT
ULF.
🗺 Aajako Map Rotation
• Match 1: Rondo
• Match 2: Erangel
• Match 3: Erangel
• Match 4: Erangel
• Match 5: Miramar
• Match 6: Miramar

📍 Venue: Tennis Indoor Stadium Senayan



#PMGO2026 #PUBGMESPORTS #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnp

💔 प्यार, दर्द और टूटे हुए अरमानों की एक भावुक कहानी लेकर आ रहा है नया मैथिली सैड सॉन्ग "गरीब के दिल"। इस गीत में एक गरीब दिल की बेबसी, सच्चे प्यार की तड़प और जुदाई का दर्द सुनने को मिलेगा। अगर आप दर्द भरे मैथिली गाने पसंद करते हैं, तो यह गीत आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा। ❤️‍🩹

snippet.title: Vallah (Official Video) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Bayanni, Harrdy S, Amitabh B | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
Warning: #Vallah may cause sudden dancing. 
Song out now.

#Cocktail2 in cinemas on June 19.

#Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Music Label : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Music - Pritam
➟ Lyrics- Amitabh Bhattacharya
➟ Punjabi Lyrics - Rony Ajnali and Gill Machhrai
➟ Singers - Bayanni, Harrdy Sandhu

➟ Music Programmer and Arranger - AM.AN
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Audio Post Production Supervisor and Chief Engineer - Ashwin Kulkarni

Music Production Managers - Anurag Sharma, Brianna Supriyo
Studio Manager - Mithila Lad Nayak

Sound Engineers - Pranav Gupta, Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee

Studio Assistants - Khush Jaggi, Ameya Dayal, Sagnik Mukherjee. 
Studio Intern- Anushree Amod

Shout - Aasa Singh
Backing Vocals Design and Vocals -  Aarvan, Aniruddh Anantha
Additional Chorus - Anurag Sharma, Akash Mukherjee, Sagnik Mukherjee

Live Guitars by - AM.AN 

Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai


#Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026


🎬 Video Credits

➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:

Ohh

let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI

Jaadu kar gayi oh mere te
Dassa main kinu
Nain shraabi jihde yaaro
Pee gayi menu 

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu

Sham dhali to nain tere ni
Hor v sohne ho jande ne
Chann v terian siftan karda
Taare pagal ho jande ne
Patlo Banke agg hai firdi
Bijli wangu saade te girdi
cock-tail to vad ke saroor a
matthe te jedi latt a girdi

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu 

Tere ch dhyaan mera renda sohniye
Dass kinne lakh da ae lehanga sohniye
Nakhre tere te a news ban gayi
Diamond de naal o vad mehanga 
Jado tu nachh diye baby 
Bada hi jach diye baby 
Ya tu pari air shaadi
Ya tu kachh diye aaae baby

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu

bn.description:
২৪ ঘন্টার জন্য পার্ম লাইট ট্রেডিং | ব্লক্স ফ্রুটস | রোব্লক্স
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
📱 আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন: 
গিভঅ্যাওয়ে এবং সাশ্রয়ী মূল্যের পোশাকের জন্য আমার রোব্লক্স কমিউনিটিতে যোগ দিন 
= https://www.roblox.com/communities/415245056/SujalisLive#!/about
২য় চ্যানেল =https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHEYPkg83NwMWahJzyWbWTQ
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/sujal_mundlia/ 
ডিসকর্ড: https://discord.gg/XtavTBQSUk
রোব্লক্স প্রোফাইল: https://www.roblox.com/users/5080383735/profile
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
🎮 চ্যানেল সম্পর্কে: 
সুজালিসলাইভ একটি হিন্দি গেমিং চ্যানেল, যেখানে আমি রোবলক্সের উপর বিনোদনমূলক এবং গল্প-নির্ভর ভিডিও আপলোড করি। এই মুহূর্তে, আমি **রোবলক্স ব্লক্স ফ্রুটস**-এর উপর মনোযোগ দিচ্ছি — এটি রোবলক্সের অন্যতম জনপ্রিয় ওয়ান পিস-অনুপ্রাণিত একটি গেম, যেখানে আপনি বসদের সাথে লড়াই করেন, লেভেল আপ করেন এবং সবচেয়ে শক্তিশালী খেলোয়াড় হয়ে ওঠেন। 

আপনি নতুন বা অভিজ্ঞ, যাই হোন না কেন, এখানে আপনি মজার মুহূর্ত, গ্রাইন্ডিং টিপস এবং দুর্দান্ত সব লড়াই খুঁজে পাবেন — সবই হিংলাশে। জিটিএ ৬ এবং তার পরবর্তী গেমগুলোর জন্য একটি অনুগত গেমিং দর্শক তৈরি করার এই যাত্রায় আমার সাথে যোগ দিন!

snippet.title: Adhuro Sapana - Salon&TheYubal | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Adhuro Sapana
Performed by: Salon Bal Tamang

“Adhuro Sapana” is an emotional song about love, trust, and betrayal. It tells the story of a boy who builds his dreams around a girl, only to be left heartbroken when she betrays him. In the end, all his dreams remain incomplete, reflecting the pain of broken trust and unfinished love.

Audio Credits
 • Vocal / Lyrics / Composition: Salon Bal Tamang

https://www.instagram.com/salon_tmg314

 • Mix / Master / Produced By: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Production)

https://www.instagram.com/omniphonics.studio

⸻

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi

A timeless romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy. Composed by Nadeem-Shravan with lyrics by Sameer, this song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and togetherness. Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

Movie: Maharaja

Label: Universal Music India

hi.title: Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho (From "Maharaja") Govinda, Manisha Koirala | Sonu Nigam | Kavita Krishnamurthy
hi.description:
A timeless romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy. Composed by Nadeem-Shravan with lyrics by Sameer, this song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and togetherness. Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Maharaja
Starring: Govinda, Manisha Koirala
Director: Anil Sharma
Producer: Naraindas Mukhija
Label: Universal Music India

snippet.title: [EN] 2026 PMGO S1 Main Event | Grand Finals | Day 1 | PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1
snippet.description:
The 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 Main Event reaches its peak with the Grand Finals. 1,000,000+ players across the globe wanted to be on this stage. Only a handful of them have shown they are more skillful than the rest. 16 teams, two days, one champion. Every squad on that roster has earned their seat the hard way. No soft paths, no charity. Just the best of the best fighting for the right to call themselves champions.

🏆 2026 PUBG MOBILE GLOBAL OPEN Season 1 | Main Event

📋 FORMAT

Group Stage :
• 32 teams split into 2 groups of 16
• 2 days total (1 day per group)
• Overall Ranking 1–6 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 7–14 → Survival Stage
• Overall Ranking 15–16 → Eliminated

Survival Stage : 
• Overall Ranking 1–4 → Grand Finals
• Overall Ranking 5–16 → Eliminated

Grand Finals (SMASH Rule)
• 16 teams — 2 days, 6 matches per day

🔥 SMASH RULE ( On Day 2) 
SMASH Rule is the most exciting way to claim the trophy but how do you do it? Here is how : 

Day 1 Overall Ranking #1 team's points +10 = Match Point Threshold.
Hit the threshold on Day 2, then win another match to claim the title.
No SMASH? Highest total points wins under standard overall ranking.

🗓 Tournament Schedule: 

Group Stage: June 2–3
Survival Stage: June 4
Grand Finals: June 6–7

Try PUBG MOBILE now:  https://pubgmobile.go.link/26pmgo
💰Total Prize Pool: $500,000 

🏅 Grand Final Teams: 
4T
721
Aur
BOOM
BTR

FURIA
GEEK
goat

• Match 1: Rondo

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Chameli [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Chameli - Ekdev Limbu (Official Video)

A broken-down car. Three unexpected encounters. One unforgettable journey.
Follow Ekdev through Chitwan as he experiences love, romance, and adventure in the most carefree way. Where reality and dreams merge into moments that change everything.

🎵 STREAM NOW 👇
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6m8AXJov9kDgC8MmUiC5ex
Apple Music :https://music.apple.com/album/6768267010

CAST
Niruta Singh 
Akriti Negi
Deekila Sherpa

AUDIO 
Artist: Ekdev Limbu
Composition & Lyrics: Ekdev Limbu
Add Composition and Lyrics: Prakash Chandra Shrestha & Salin Magar
Producer: Saswot Shrestha
Mixing and Mastering Engineer: Saswot Shrestha
Audio Production Studio: Omniphonics Studio
Audio Manager: Bhaba Shrestha
Studio Assistance: Pradhumna Shrestha

VIDEO
Production Company: Numa Films 
Director: Anjon Limbu
Co-Director: Rob
Assistant Director: Sanjay Limbu
DOP: Saurav Lamichhane
1st AC / Camera Operator: Sushil Khanal

Editor: Rob
Colorist: Anjon Limbu
Color Assistant: Sadeep Khatri
Behind the Scenes: Aditya Lama
Assistant Production Manager: Sandesh Shahi
Artwork: Praeev Shrestha

CHOREOGRAPHY
Dance Choreography: Sushant Khatri
Assistant Choreography: Ashmee Bhujel
Dance Coordinator & Dance Crew Logistics: Sujan Rai 

COSTUME & STYLING
Stylist: Markush Tamang
Culture Dress: Sauraha Culture Dress Rental House
Makeup Artist: Mila Shrestha
Assistant Makeup Artist: Roshni Shrestha

LIGHTING DEPARTMENT
Gaffer: Pawan Uraw
Lightman: Himal Sharma
Grip: Vten Bhai

LOCATION SPONSORS
Banbas Resort, Chitwan 
Bagar Hospitality, Chitwan

TRAVEL PARTNER
Nepal Vision Treks & Expedition 
Ashim Wagle 

SPECIAL THANKS
OSR Digital, Hook Studio and Saujanya Wagle

Special featured: "Lahana Le Jurayo Ki"
Singer: Sadhana Sargam | Lyrics: Tulsi Ghimire | Music: Ranjit Gajmer

Executive Producer and Artist Manager: Bhaba Shrestha 
For Business inquiries : ekdevlimbu@gmail.com

bn.title: ছেলে বনাম মেয়েদের স্কুল পোশাকের টাওয়ারে আপনি কোনটি বেশি পছন্দ করবেন!!
bn.description:
ছেলে বনাম মেয়েদের স্কুল পোশাকের টাওয়ার!!

bn.title: আপনি কি ROBLOX-এ কাওয়াই নাকি চ্যাড টাওয়ারে খেলবেন !!
bn.description:
রোবলক্সে আপনি কি কাওয়াই নাকি চ্যাড টাওয়ার বেশি পছন্দ করবেন!!

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে “ন্যায্য ব্যবহার”-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

snippet.title: Tera Fitoor Jab Se Chadh Gaya Re - Lyrics | Arijit Singh | Himesh Reshammiya | Evergreen Love Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Tera Fitoor
Movie: Genius
Singer: Arijit Singh
Music: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist: Kumaar

Lyrics:
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Tu Jo Mere Sang Chalne Lage
Toh Meri Raahe Dhadakne Lage
Dekhun Jo Na Ek Pal Main Tumhe
Toh Meri Baahein Tadapne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Haathon Se, Lakeere Yehi Kehti Hai
Ke Zindagi Jo Hai Meri, Tujhi Mein Ab Rehti Hai

Labon Pe Likhi Hai Mere Dil Ki Khwahish,
Lafzon Mein Kaise Main Bataaun
Ek Tujhko Hi Paane Ki Khatir,
Sab Se Juda Main Ho Jaaun

Kal Tak Maine Jo Bhi Khwaab The Dekhe
Tujh Mein Woh Dikhne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Saanson Ke Kinaare Bade Tanha The,
Tu Aake Inhein Chhu Le Bas 
Yehi To Mere Armaan The

Saari Duniya Se Mujhe Kya Lena Hai,
Bas Tujhko Hi Pehchaanu
Mujhko Na Meri Ab Khabar Ho Koi,
Tujhse Hi Khud Ko Main Jaanu

Raatein Nahi Kat Ti Bechain Se Hoke,
Din Bhi Guzarne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

snippet.title: Live Lok Dohori Nepali | "मायालुको बोली" Mayaluko Boli - Raju Pariyar & Balika Tamang
snippet.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Mayaluko Boli" By Raju Pariyar & Balika Tamang , brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection.

लाईभ दोहोरी नेपाली लोकसंगीतका सबैभन्दा जीवन्त र अन्तरक्रियात्मक स्वरूपहरूमध्ये एक हो, जसलाई वास्तविक समयमा प्रस्तुत गरिन्छ र दर्शकहरूले पनि प्रायः सहभागिता जनाउँछन्। यो केवल संगीत प्रस्तुति मात्र होइन—यो सांस्कृतिक संवाद हो, जसले बुद्धि, ताल, र कथावाचनलाई मिसाउँछ।

localized.title: Live Lok Dohori Nepali | "मायालुको बोली" Mayaluko Boli - Raju Pariyar & Balika Tamang
localized.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Mayaluko Boli" By Raju Pariyar & Balika Tamang , brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection.

लाईभ दोहोरी नेपाली लोकसंगीतका सबैभन्दा जीवन्त र अन्तरक्रियात्मक स्वरूपहरूमध्ये एक हो, जसलाई वास्तविक समयमा प्रस्तुत गरिन्छ र दर्शकहरूले पनि प्रायः सहभागिता जनाउँछन्। यो केवल संगीत प्रस्तुति मात्र होइन—यो सांस्कृतिक संवाद हो, जसले बुद्धि, ताल, र कथावाचनलाई मिसाउँछ।

bn.title: বুয়াহ অ্যাওয়ার্ড : পুরস্কার জেতার পর সুনীতা, টোন্ডে গেমার, দেশি গেমার, টোটাল গেমিং-এর প্রতিক্রি...
bn.description:
হ্যালো বন্ধুরা, আমি নেপাল থেকে অভিষেক মহারজন। আমি ফ্রিফায়ার গেমিং কমিউনিটির খবরাখবর তুলে ধরি। সঙ্গীত এবং ভিডিওর সম্পূর্ণ কৃতিত্ব নির্মাতাদের।

আমাকে ইনস্টাগ্রামে ফলো করুন - (১ হাজার ফলোয়ার হলে গিভঅ্যাওয়ে আছে) https://www.instagram.com/newar_abishek/

আমার ভ্লগটি দেখুন - https://youtu.be/jPgvaDUl5Lg
আশা করি আপনারা দেখবেন!!

টপ-আপ পেজ লিংক - https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100069970844900&mibextid=ZbWKwL

আমার দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://youtube.com/shorts/Uk0Hk96oKZw?si=MpfpKbTKORH_X-Mo

ব্যাকগ্রাউন্ড গেমপ্লে - ৪ ফ্ল্যাগ গেমার

আউট্রো - বাসু কাইন্থ (রিত্বিজ ম্যাশআপ)
দেশি গেমারের পক্ষ থেকে ❤️🫶
সমস্ত মিউজিকের কৃতিত্ব তাদের। এই ভাইবিং মিউজিকের জন্য অনুগ্রহ করে তাদের চ্যানেল ভিজিট করুন।

অনুগ্রহ করে, এই ভিডিও বা মিউজিক নিয়ে আপনার কোনো সমস্যা থাকলে, আমাকে মেইল ​​আইডিতে জানান অথবা ভিডিওতে কমেন্ট করেও জানাতে পারেন। আমি ২৪ ঘণ্টার মধ্যে চ্যানেল থেকে এটি সরিয়ে ফেলব। এই ভিডিওটি তৈরির উদ্দেশ্য হলো FF গেমিং কমিউনিটি সম্পর্কে তথ্য দেওয়া 😊

ইমেইল আইডি : gamingabishek63@gmail.com

ইনস্টাগ্রাম : https://www.instagram.com/newar_abishek/

ফেসবুক : https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100027796205705

গিল্ড : ᴀɢ_ᴛʀᴏᴏᴘꜱ
IGN : ᴀɢ ᴀʙɪꜱʜᴇᴋꔪ
Uid : 582089305

📄 কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ : কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, শিক্ষাদান এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহার"-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। অলাভজনক শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

দেখার জন্য ধন্যবাদ 😊

விளையாட்டின் பெயர் - Garena Free Fire

📝பொறுப்புத் துறப்பு :- இது விளையாட்டாளர்கள் (Garena Free Fire) பார்வையாளர்களுக்காக, பொழுதுபோக்கு நோக்கத்திற்காக மட்டுமே உருவாக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு விளையாட்டு/பொழுதுபோக்கு காணொளி ஆகும். இந்தக் காணொளியில் தீங்கு விளைவிக்கும் உள்ளடக்கங்கள் எதுவும் இல்லை. இது வெறும் வேடிக்கை மற்றும் பொழுதுபோக்கிற்காக மட்டுமே - ஒரு கேமிங்காக

ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் சிறந்த நாடுகள்
1. கரீனா ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் இந்தோனேசியா லைவ்
2. கரீனா ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் பிரேசில் லைவ்
3. கரீனா ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் பிரேசில் லைவ்
4. கரீனா ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் இந்தியா லைவ்
5. கரீனா ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் சிங்கப்பூர் லைவ்
6. கரீனா ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் தாய்லாந்து லைவ்

குறிப்பு :- 1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107 இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்பு, விமர்சனம், கருத்து, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கல்வி மற்றும் ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது. நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாக இருக்கலாம். இலாப நோக்கற்ற, கல்வி அல்லது தனிப்பட்ட பயன்பாடு நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்குச் சாதகமாக அமைகிறது.

📝నిరాకరణ :- ఇది గేమర్స్ ప్రేక్షకుల (గరీనా ఫ్రీ ఫైర్) వినోదం కోసం మాత్రమే రూపొందించబడిన ఒక గేమ్‌ప్లే/వినోద వీడియో. ఈ వీడియోలో ఎలాంటి హానికరమైన కంటెంట్ లేదు. ఇది కేవలం సరదా మరియు వినోదం కోసం మాత్రమే - గేమింగ్ గా

గమనిక :- కాపీరైట్ చట్టం 1976లోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్య, వార్తా నివేదన, పాండిత్యం మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం సముచిత వినియోగానికి అనుమతి ఇవ్వబడింది. సముచిత వినియోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టం ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక వినియోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు. లాభాపేక్ష లేని, విద్యా సంబంధమైన లేదా వ్యక్తిగత వినియోగం సముచిత వినియోగానికి అనుకూలంగా ఉంటుంది.

📝നിരാകരണം :- ഇത് ഗെയിമർമാരുടെ പ്രേക്ഷകർക്കായി മാത്രം വിനോദത്തിനായി നിർമ്മിച്ച ഒരു ഗെയിംപ്ലേ/വിനോദ വീഡിയോയാണ് (ഗരേന ഫ്രീ ഫയർ). ഈ വീഡിയോയിൽ ദോഷകരമായ ഉള്ളടക്കങ്ങളൊന്നുമില്ല. ഇത് വിനോദത്തിനും വിനോദത്തിനും വേണ്ടി മാത്രമാണ് - ഗെയിമിംഗ് ആയി

ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ടോപ്പ് കൺട്രി
1.ഗരീന ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ഇന്തോനേഷ്യ ലൈവ്
2.ഗരീന ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ബ്രസീൽ ലൈവ്
3.ഗരീന ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ബ്രസീൽ ലൈവ്
4.ഗരീന ഫ്രീ ഫയർ ഇന്ത്യ ലൈവ്
5.ഗരീന ഫ്രീ ഫയർ സിംഗപ്പൂർ ലൈവ്
6.ഗരീന ഫ്രീ ഫയർ തായ്‌ലൻഡ് ലൈവ്

കുറിപ്പ് :- 1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന് അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമം അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം. ലാഭേച്ഛയില്ലാത്തതോ, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസപരമോ അല്ലെങ്കിൽ വ്യക്തിഗതമോ ആയ ഉപയോഗം ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന് അനുകൂലമായി സന്തുലിതാവസ്ഥയെ സൂചിപ്പിക്കുന്നു.

നന്ദി

സാഹിൽ റാണയിൽ നിന്ന്

Chahat Ko Tum Zinda Rakhna, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.

te.title: అమ్మబాబోయ్! నా జీవితంలో ఇదే అత్యంత అదృష్టవంతమైన ఫిషింగ్ రోజు + Blox Fruits లో ఇది జరిగింది..! ☠️
te.description:
అమ్మో! నా జీవితంలోనే అత్యంత అదృష్టవంతమైన చేపలు పట్టే రోజు + బ్లాక్స్ ఫ్రూట్స్‌లో ఇది జరిగింది..! ☠️ 
+ చేపలు పట్టడం ద్వారా నాకు ఏమి దొరికిందో చూడండి 

+ క్షమించండి, 6 రోజులుగా వీడియో పెట్టలేదు, నిజ జీవితంలో ఉద్యోగంతో చాలా బిజీగా ఉన్నాను. మరో నెలలో నాకు 3 వారాల పాటు వేసవి సెలవులు రాబోతున్నాయి, అప్పుడు నేను ప్రతి 2-3 రోజులకు ఒక వీడియో పోస్ట్ చేస్తాను!

#bloxfruits #roblox

ml.title: OMG! എനിക്കേറ്റവും ഭാഗ്യമുള്ള മീൻപിടുത്ത ദിനം + Blox Fruits-ൽ ഇത് സംഭവിച്ചു..! ☠️
ml.description:
ഓ എന്റെ ഏറ്റവും ഭാഗ്യകരമായ മീൻപിടുത്ത ദിനം + ഇത് ബ്ലോക്സ് ഫ്രൂട്ട്സിൽ സംഭവിച്ചു..! ☠️ 
+ മീൻപിടുത്തത്തിൽ നിന്ന് എനിക്ക് എന്താണ് ലഭിച്ചതെന്ന് നോക്കൂ 

+ ക്ഷമിക്കണം 6 ദിവസം വീഡിയോ ഇല്ല, യഥാർത്ഥ ജീവിതത്തിലെ തിരക്കിലാണ്, ഒരു മാസം കൂടി കഴിഞ്ഞാൽ എനിക്ക് 3 ആഴ്ച വേനൽക്കാല അവധി ലഭിക്കും, ഓരോ 2-3 ദിവസവും ഞാൻ പോസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്യും = 1 വീഡിയോ!

#bloxfruits #roblox

hi.title: हे भगवान! Blox Fruits में मेरा अब तक का सबसे लकी फिशिंग दिन + यह क्या हो गया..! ☠️
hi.description:
OMG! आज मेरा सबसे खुशनसीब मछली पकड़ने का दिन था! + Blox Fruits में ये सब हुआ..! ☠️
+ देखो मुझे मछली पकड़ने से क्या मिला!

+ माफ़ करना, 6 दिन से वीडियो नहीं डाला, असल ज़िंदगी में नौकरी की वजह से बहुत व्यस्त था। 1 महीने बाद मेरी 3 हफ्ते की गर्मियों की छुट्टियाँ शुरू होंगी और मैं हर 2-3 दिन में एक वीडियो डालूँगा!

#bloxfruits #roblox

ru.title: О БОЖЕ! Мой самый удачный день на РЫБАЛКЕ + ЭТО СЛУЧИЛОСЬ в Blox Fruits..! ☠️
ru.description:
О боже! Мой самый удачный день на рыбалке! + Это случилось в Blox Fruits..! ☠️
+ Посмотрите, что я поймал на рыбалке!

+ Извините, 6 дней не было видео, слишком занят на работе. Через месяц у меня будут летние каникулы на 3 недели, и я буду выкладывать видео каждые 2-3 дня = 1 видео!

#bloxfruits #roblox

pl.title: O mój Boże! Mój najszczęśliwszy dzień wędkarski w życiu + TO STAŁO SIĘ w Blox Fruits...! ☠️
pl.description:
O mój Boże! Mój najszczęśliwszy dzień wędkarski w życiu + TO SIĘ STAŁO w Blox Fruits...! ☠️ 
+ ZOBACZCIE, CO DOSTAŁEM OD WĘDKOWANIA

+ Przepraszam, 6 dni bez filmu, jestem zbyt zajęty pracą w realu, za miesiąc będę miał 3 tygodnie wakacji i będę wrzucał co 2-3 dni = 1 film!

#bloxfruits #roblox

iw.title: אומייגאד! יום הדיג הכי בר-מזל שלי אי פעם + זה קרה ב-Blox Fruits..! ☠️
iw.description:
אלוהים אדירים! יום הדיג הכי בר מזל שלי אי פעם + זה קרה ב-Blox Fruits..! ☠️

#bloxfruits #roblox

pa.title: OMG! ਮੇਰਾ ਹੁਣ ਤੱਕ ਦਾ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਕਿਸਮਤ ਵਾਲਾ FISHING ਦਿਨ + Blox Fruits ਵਿੱਚ ਇਹ ਹੋਇਆ..! ☠️
pa.description:
ਓ ਐਮ ਜੀ! ਮੇਰਾ ਹੁਣ ਤੱਕ ਦਾ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਖੁਸ਼ਕਿਸਮਤ ਮੱਛੀ ਫੜਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਦਿਨ + ਬਲੌਕਸ ਫਲਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਇਹ ਹੋਇਆ..! ☠️ 
+ ਦੇਖੋ ਮੈਨੂੰ ਮੱਛੀ ਫੜਨ ਤੋਂ ਕੀ ਮਿਲਿਆ 

+ ਮਾਫ਼ ਕਰਨਾ 6 ਦਿਨ ਕੋਈ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨਹੀਂ ਅਸਲ ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀ ਦੇ ਕੰਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਬਹੁਤ ਰੁੱਝਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ 1 ਮਹੀਨੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੋਰ ਮੇਰੇ ਕੋਲ 3 ਹਫ਼ਤੇ ਲਈ ਗਰਮੀਆਂ ਦੀਆਂ ਛੁੱਟੀਆਂ ਹੋਣਗੀਆਂ ਅਤੇ ਮੈਂ ਹਰ 2-3 ਦਿਨਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਪੋਸਟ ਕਰਾਂਗਾ = 1 ਵੀਡੀਓ!

#bloxfruits #roblox

ar.title: يا إلهي! أكثر يوم حظيت فيه بالصيد في حياتي + هذا ما حدث في Blox Fruits..! ☠️

#bloxfruits #roblox

+ Désolé pour les 6 jours sans vidéo, j'étais trop occupé par mon travail. Dans un mois, je serai en vacances pendant 3 semaines et je posterai une vidéo tous les 2-3 jours !

#bloxfruits #roblox

bn.title: ওএমজি! আমার জীবনের সবচেয়ে ভাগ্যবান মাছ ধরার দিন + সাথে ব্লক্স ফ্রুটসে এই ঘটনাও ঘটল..! ☠️

+ দেখুন মাছ ধরে আমি কী পেলাম 

+ দুঃখিত, ৬ দিন কোনো ভিডিও দিইনি, বাস্তব জীবনের চাকরিতে খুব ব্যস্ত ছিলাম। আর এক মাস পর আমার ৩ সপ্তাহের গ্রীষ্মকালীন ছুটি শুরু হবে এবং তখন থেকে আমি প্রতি ২-৩ দিন পর পর একটি করে ভিডিও পোস্ট করব!

#bloxfruits #roblox

ta.title: அடடா! என் வாழ்நாளில் இதுவே அதிர்ஷ்டமான மீன்பிடி நாள் + அதுவும் ப்ளாக்ஸ் ஃப்ரூட்ஸில் நடந்தது..! ☠️
ta.description:
அடடா! என் வாழ்நாளில் மிகவும் அதிர்ஷ்டமான மீன்பிடி நாள் + இது ப்ளாக்ஸ் ஃப்ரூட்ஸில் நடந்தது..! ☠️

+ மன்னிக்கவும், 6 நாட்களாக வீடியோ இல்லை, நிஜ வாழ்க்கை வேலையில் மிகவும் பிஸியாக இருக்கிறேன். இன்னும் ஒரு மாதத்தில் எனக்கு 3 வார கோடை விடுமுறை வரப்போகிறது, அப்போது நான் 2-3 நாட்களுக்கு ஒரு வீடியோ பதிவிடுவேன்!

snippet.title: Mere Haal Par – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Mere Haal Par – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Na jawaab de…
na sawaal kar…
mujhe chhod de
mere haal par.

Tujhe kya milega
mujhe tod kar…
hum to pehle hi
andar se bikhar chuke hain.

Mohabbat ne
itna tanha kar diya…
ab kisi se
shikayat bhi nahi hoti.

“Mere Haal Par”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo dard me bhi
khamoshi se jeena seekh gaya.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

mujhe chhod do
mere haal par…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein sirf dard mila ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs Day 2 | English
snippet.description:
Welcome to Day 2 of the MPL ID Season 17 Playoffs! 🔥

The battle for the championship continues as the stakes get even higher. Every game, every objective, and every decision can shape a team's journey toward the MPL ID S17 title.

The opening match will feature Team Liquid ID vs GEEK Fam. After surviving the previous round, GEEK faces another major challenge as they take on TLID, a team determined to make a deep Playoff run. Who will keep their championship dreams alive?

In the second match, the Regular Season leaders ONIC will begin their Playoff campaign against Bigetron Esports. ONIC enters as the most dominant and consistent team of the season, while BTR looks to overcome the pressure and continue their pursuit of MPL glory.

With a spot in the next stage on the line, every team will be giving their all on the Land of Dawn. Don't miss another day of intense action as Indonesia's best teams battle for the MPL ID S17 crown!
Infinix GT 50 Pro is Now Available! ⚡

snippet.title: श्री राम की गली में तुम जाना | Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana | Nachte Milenge Hanumana
snippet.description:
Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana | Hanuman Bhajan for Energy, Bhakti & Positivity | Sanatan Music

“Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana” is a joyful and powerful Hanuman bhajan filled with Ram bhakti, celebration, and devotional energy. This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram — where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

✨ Why listen to this Hanuman bhajan:
• Brings energetic Ram bhakti and powerful devotional vibes
• Perfect for Tuesday/Saturday puja, satsang, and daily devotion
• Helps build courage, positivity, and inner strength
• Creates an uplifting atmosphere filled with Hanuman ji’s protection and grace

🎧 Play it loud, chant along, and feel the energy — wherever Shri Ram’s name is remembered, Hanuman ji’s devotion comes alive.
🙏 If this bhajan filled your heart with bhakti, please like, share, and subscribe to Sanatan Music for more Hanuman bhajans, Ram bhajans, and devotional songs.

🔐 Copyright Notice
© Sanatan Music. All rights reserved.
This is an original devotional composition produced and licensed by Sanatan Music. Unauthorized re-upload or use is strictly prohibited.

এই ভিডিওতে, আমি ফ্রি ফায়ারের সবচেয়ে জনপ্রিয় কিছু ক্যারেক্টারের আসল আইডি খুঁজে বের করেছি 😱
যা একটি সাধারণ অনুসন্ধান হিসাবে শুরু হয়েছিল, তা দ্রুত একটি চাঞ্চল্যকর তদন্তে পরিণত হয়, কারণ আমি ফ্রি ফায়ারের ভিতরে লুকিয়ে থাকা বিরল অ্যাকাউন্ট, এক্সক্লুসিভ সংগ্রহ এবং কিছু অবিশ্বাস্য বিবরণ আবিষ্কার করি।

snippet.description:
The official music video for Ariana Grande’s “hate that i made you love me” 

Listen to “hate that i made you love me”: https://arianagrande.lnk.to/htimylm

Shop the ‘petal’ and “hate that i made you love me” collections: https://arianagrande.lnk.to/shop

https://www.arianagrande.com
https://instagram.com/arianagrande

https://facebook.com/arianagrande

► Subscribe to Ariana Grande: https://arianagrande.lnk.to/subscribe

Credits:
Director: Christian Breslauer
Production Company: London Alley & Lucky Bastards
Producers: Andrew Lerios, Mike Breslauer, Luga Podesta
Director of Photography: Janusz Kamiński
Production Designer: Taisa Malouf
1st AD: Jonas Morales 
Production Manager: Nick Pistone
Stunt Coordinator: Paul Lacovara
Post Supervisor: Ivan Ovalle
Editor: Luis Caraza 
Colorist: Matt Wallach
FX: Mathematic
Titles & Poster Design - @rising67.studio

Official “hate that i made you love me” lyrics: 

i can’t tell you why 
but something inside 
is dancing with fire 
eyes lit like the sky 
turned tears into diamonds 
got good at goodbyes
 
just know that i will find my way from you               
like flowers from a tomb 
while you decide who you are 
and i can see right through
like shadows on the moon 
and it’s all bad news  
 
yeah i i i 
hate that i made you love me 
sorry if i made me your type 
yeah i i hate that i made you love me 
cause i barely tried 
 
what’s happening now ?
you studied my crown 
and borrowed my body 
warm, kissed by the sun 
then cold like the wind 
a bee stuck in honey
 
know that i will find my way from you 
i guess it’s kinda cute
how you like me where you are 
but i can see right through
just don’t eclipse the moon
cause it’s all bad news
 
yeah i i i 
hate that i made you love me 
sorry if i made me your type 
yeah i i hate that i made you love me 
cause i barely tried 
 
i’ve held your projections when you’ve felt so insecure 
tell me why is it this way 
why you so hate to see women endure 
is it really my fault 
you all gave me your hearts 
of your own accord ?
i don’t really think so 
 
 i i i 
hate that i made you love me 
sorry if i made me your type 
yeah i i hate that i made you love me 
cause i barely tried

Lirik resmi “hate that i made you love me”:

Aku tak bisa memberitahumu alasannya
tapi sesuatu di dalam diriku
menari dengan api
mata bersinar seperti langit
mengubah air mata menjadi berlian
menjadi mahir dalam perpisahan

ketahuilah bahwa aku akan menemukan jalanku darimu
seperti bunga dari makam
sementara kau memutuskan siapa dirimu
dan aku bisa melihat semuanya
seperti bayangan di bulan
dan itu semua kabar buruk

ya aku aku aku
benci karena aku membuatmu mencintaiku
maaf jika aku menjadi tipe idealmu
ya aku aku benci karena aku membuatmu mencintaiku
karena aku hampir tidak berusaha

apa yang terjadi sekarang ?

Kau mengamati mahkotaku
dan meminjam tubuhku
hangat, dicium matahari
lalu dingin seperti angin
seekor lebah yang terjebak dalam madu

ketahuilah bahwa aku akan menemukan jalanku darimu
kurasa itu agak lucu
bagaimana kau menyukaiku di tempatmu berada
tapi aku bisa melihat semuanya
jangan sampai menutupi bulan
karena itu semua kabar buruk

ya aku aku aku
benci karena aku membuatmu mencintaiku
maaf jika aku menjadi tipe idealmu
ya aku aku benci karena aku membuatmu mencintaiku
karena aku hampir tidak berusaha

aku telah menampung proyeksimu ketika kau merasa sangat tidak aman
katakan padaku mengapa seperti ini
mengapa kau begitu benci melihat wanita menderita
apakah ini benar-benar salahku
kalian semua memberikan hati kalian kepadaku
atas kemauan kalian sendiri?

Aku rasa tidak begitu

Aku benci karena aku membuatmu mencintaiku
Maaf jika aku menjadi tipe idealmu
Ya, aku benci karena aku membuatmu mencintaiku

Testo ufficiale di "hate that i made you love me":

Non so dirti perché
ma qualcosa dentro di me
sta danzando con il fuoco
occhi che brillano come il cielo
lacrime trasformate in diamanti
sono diventato bravo a dire addio

sappi solo che troverò la mia strada lontano da te
come fiori da una tomba
mentre tu decidi chi sei
e io ci vedo attraverso
come ombre sulla luna
e sono tutte brutte notizie

sì io io io
odio averti fatto innamorare di me
scusa se mi sono fatto diventare il tuo tipo
sì io io odio averti fatto innamorare di me
perché ci ho provato a malapena

cosa sta succedendo adesso?

Hai studiato la mia corona
e preso in prestito il mio corpo
caldo, baciato dal sole
poi freddo come il vento
un'ape intrappolata nel miele

sappi che troverò la mia strada lontano da te
credo sia carino
come ti piaccio dove sei
ma riesco a vedere attraverso
non eclissare la luna
perché porta solo brutte notizie

sì io io io
odio averti fatto innamorare di me
scusa se mi sono resa il tuo tipo
sì io io odio averti fatto innamorare di me
perché ci ho provato a malapena

ho trattenuto le tue proiezioni quando ti sentivi così insicuro
dimmi perché è così
perché odi tanto vedere le donne soffrire
è davvero colpa mia?
mi avete dato tutti i vostri cuori
di vostra spontanea volontà?

Non credo proprio

io io io
odio il fatto di averti fatto innamorare di me
scusa se mi sono resa il tuo tipo
sì io io odio il fatto di averti fatto innamorare di me

desculpe se eu me tornei seu tipo

porque eu mal tentei

i can’t tell you why

is dancing with fire

like flowers from a tomb 
while you decide who you are 
and i can see right through

yeah i i i

what’s happening now ?
you studied my crown 
and borrowed my body 
warm, kissed by the sun 
then cold like the wind 
a bee stuck in honey
 
know that i will find my way from you

but i can see right through

yeah i i i

is it really my fault 
you all gave me your hearts 
of your own accord ?

 i i i 
hate that i made you love me

Je ne peux pas te dire pourquoi
mais quelque chose en moi
danse avec le feu
mes yeux brillent comme le ciel
j'ai transformé mes larmes en diamants
je suis devenue experte en adieux

sache juste que je trouverai un moyen de m'éloigner de toi
comme des fleurs d'une tombe
pendant que tu décides qui tu es
et je vois clair dans ton jeu
comme des ombres sur la lune
et ce ne sont que de mauvaises nouvelles

ouais, je, je, je
déteste t'avoir fait m'aimer
désolée si je suis ton genre
ouais, je, je déteste t'avoir fait m'aimer
parce que je n'ai presque rien fait

Que se passe-t-il maintenant ?

Tu as scruté ma tête
et emprunté mon corps
chaud, caressé par le soleil
puis froid comme le vent
une abeille prise au piège du miel

Sache que je retrouverai mon chemin loin de toi
C'est plutôt mignon, je suppose

que tu m'apprécies là où tu es

Mais je vois clair dans ton jeu

Ne fais pas d'ombre à la lune

car ce ne sera que de mauvaises nouvelles

Oui, je... je...

Je déteste t'avoir fait m'aimer

Désolée si je suis devenue ton genre

Oui, je... je déteste t'avoir fait m'aimer

car je n'ai presque rien fait

J'ai porté tes projections quand tu te sentais si vulnérable
Dis-moi pourquoi c'est ainsi

Pourquoi détestes-tu tant voir les femmes souffrir

Est-ce vraiment ma faute

Vous m'avez tous donné votre cœur

de votre plein gré ? Je ne crois pas vraiment.

Je… je… je…

Je déteste t’avoir fait m’aimer.

Désolée si je suis ton genre.

Ouais, je… je déteste t’avoir fait m’aimer.

Parce que je n’ai presque rien fait.

Offizieller Text von „Hate That I Made You Love Me“:

Ich kann dir nicht sagen, warum

tanzt vor Feuer

Abschiede gelingen mir immer besser

Ich werde meinen Weg von dir finden

wie Blumen aus einem Grab

während du überlegst, wer du bist

und ich durchschaue dich
wie Schatten auf dem Mond

und es sind nur schlechte Nachrichten

Ja, ich
ich hasse es
ich hasse es, dass ich dich dazu gebracht habe, mich zu lieben

Tut mir leid, falls ich zu deinem Typ geworden bin
Ja, ich hasse es
ich habe es kaum versucht

Was ist Passiert das gerade?
Du hast meine Krone studiert
und meinen Körper ausgeliehen
warm, von der Sonne geküsst
dann kalt wie der Wind
eine Biene im Honig

wie du mich magst, wo du bist
aber ich durchschaue dich
nur verdunkel nicht den Mond
denn das bringt nur Ärger

Tut mir leid, falls ich zu deinem Typ geworden bin
Ja, ich hasse es, dass ich dich dazu gebracht habe, mich zu lieben
denn ich habe es kaum versucht

Ich habe deine Projektionen ertragen, als du dich so unsicher gefühlt hast
Sag mir, warum ist es so
warum hasst du es so sehr, Frauen leiden zu sehen
Ist es wirklich meine Schuld
Ihr habt mir alle eure Herzen geschenkt
aus freiem Willen?
Ich glaube nicht wirklich.

Ich hasse es, dass ich dich dazu gebracht habe, mich zu lieben. Tut mir leid, falls ich zu deinem Typ geworden bin. Ja, ich hasse es, dass ich dich dazu gebracht habe, mich zu lieben, denn ich habe es kaum versucht.

तुमने मेरे ताज का अध्ययन किया

गर्म, सूरज की किरणों से भीगा हुआ

Letra oficial de “Hate That I Made You Love Me”:

No puedo decirte por qué
pero algo dentro
baila con fuego
ojos brillantes como el cielo
convirtió lágrimas en diamantes
se volvió experto en despedidas

solo sé que encontraré mi camino lejos de ti
como flores de una tumba
mientras decides quién eres
y puedo ver a través de ti
como sombras en la luna
y todo son malas noticias

sí, yo, yo, yo
odio haberte hecho amarme
perdón si me convertí en tu tipo
sí, yo, yo odio haberte hecho amarme
porque apenas lo intenté

¿qué está pasando ahora?
Estudiaste mi corona
y tomaste prestado mi cuerpo
cálido, besado por el sol
luego frío como el viento
una abeja atrapada en miel

sé que encontraré mi camino lejos de ti
supongo que es algo tierno
cómo te gusto donde estás
pero puedo ver a través de ti
solo no eclipses la luna
porque todo son malas noticias

sí, yo, yo, yo
odio haber hecho que me amaras
perdón si me convertí en tu tipo
sí, yo, yo odio haber hecho que me amaras
porque apenas lo intenté
he sostenido tus proyecciones cuando te has sentido tan inseguro
dime por qué es así
¿por qué odias tanto ver sufrir a las mujeres?
¿es realmente mi culpa?
¿Todos me entregaron sus corazones
por voluntad propia?
No lo creo.

Odio haber hecho que me amaras.
Lo siento si me convertí en tu tipo.
Sí, odio haber hecho que me amaras.
Porque apenas lo intenté.
